creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
I cannot mount KBFS. Here's what I get instead:

    $ kbfsfuse mnt
    ▶ INFO KBFS version 5.5.2
    ▶ DEBUG Connecting to socket with dialFiles=[/home/0mp/.config/keybase/keybased.sock], bindFiles=/home/0mp/.config/keybase/keybased.sock
    $ echo $?
    1

I've not troubleshoot the issue too thoroughly. Restarting the Keybase daemon does not help. Neither removing the socket files.

I'm opening this issue so that other users are aware of this problem.

My setup:
- FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT #3 r367589
- kbfsd-1.5.3
- keybase-5.5.2
